title: Agents in Production: How OpenGov Built and Scaled OG Assist - Gabe De Mesa, OpenGov
summary: Gabe De Mesa from OpenGov discusses building and scaling the OG Assist AI agent product serving thousands of state and local governments. The talk covers agent architecture, core loops, feedback mechanisms, long context handling, monitoring, tooling, and integration with Claude and Cursor.
writeup: Gabe De Mesa of OpenGov walks through how the company built and scaled OG Assist, an AI agent product serving thousands of state and local governments. The talk covers the agent architecture and core loops, feedback mechanisms, long-context handling, monitoring, and tooling, along with integration with Claude and Cursor. It connects production concerns like observability and evals to the realities of running agents at scale across many government customers.
